name: Scallops for Punky
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Cherry tomatoes, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw scallops and rinse; drain well.
2. Combine water, lemon juice, 1/2 tsp salt, peppercorns, and onions in a saucepan. Bring to boil.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes. Add scallops and cover. Simmer gently for an additional 10 minutes until tender.
4. Drain the scallops.
5. In a separate bowl, combine vinegar, salad oil, sugar, remaining salt, and garlic. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
6. Pour the dressing over the scallops.
7. Chill several hours to allow flavors to meld.
8. Add celery, mix gently, and drain any excess liquid.
9. Arrange greens in a salad bowl.
10. Pile scallops and celery in the center and arrange the remaining foods (eggs, cheese, onions, radishes, cherry tomatoes) around them.
11. Serve with the reserved marinade or another favorite French or oil and vinegar dressing.
